title: empusa odorata
intro: Empusa odorata, also known as devil's claw, is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the family Martyniaceae. The plant's tuberous root has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Empusa odorata include relief from arthritis, diabetes, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Empusa odorata is commonly prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tincture form, and can also be consumed as a tea or added to topical creams for localized relief.
